title: Yusuf Pathan's Father-In-Law Beats Up Mumbai Man With Bamboo Sticks, Baseball Bat; Arrested
description: The Byculla Police Station has arrested the three accused under relevant sections of the Indian Penal Code, including 118(2), 115(2), 324, 352, 351(2), and 3(5). One person is still absconding in the case, police said.
